--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(HealthTech_PatientRecords)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(HealthTech_PatientRecords)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech EMR Sync项目设计一个ZKP工具选型的工作流图。核心场景是DiagnosticEngine需要集成零知识证明功能，同时要和PatientRecords系统打通。起点应该是定义需求，然后进入候选库筛选。
明白了，起点是Define ZKP requirements节点，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。筛选之后如果直接通过就往下走吗？还是需要有淘汰分支？
需要淘汰分支。Shortlist之后要评估integration fit，标注在PatientRecords上下文里。但更重要的是——筛选阶段本身就要能直接拒绝，比如某些库根本不支持我们的平台约束，这种直接走Reject分支，不用进入Fit评估。
好的，我添加了Shortlist到Fit的主路径，标注"fits platform constraints"，同时加了Shortlist直接到Reject的分支，标注"lacks required support"。Fit之后是Bench节点吗？
对，Bench也放在PatientRecords上下文。Benchmark之后要分叉：达到PoC目标的进入Select，没达到的应该回到Shortlist重新考虑其他候选，而不是直接拒绝——可能只是参数调优问题。
已添加Bench到Select（标注"meets PoC targets"）和Bench回到Shortlist（标注"fails targets"）。Select之后是Document决策吗？
是的，Document之后要闭环回到DiagnosticEngine，表示决策已记录并反馈给引擎团队。另外Reject节点也应该能回到Shortlist——比如后续版本可能修复了之前缺失的支持。
确认一下整体结构：起点HealthTech_EMR_Sync进入Define，经Shortlist分支到Fit或Reject，Reject可回Shortlist；Fit后到Bench，Bench分叉到Select或回Shortlist；Select后到Document，最终回到HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。这样闭环完整吗？
完整了。标题用"Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison"，配置用base主题。这个工作流覆盖了从需求定义到最终决策记录的全链路。
